title: Crispy Norteno Tacos
description: A flavorful Mexican dish featuring crispy tacos filled with a delicious norteno filling.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Cook the totopos until crispy, about 2-3 minutes per side.
In a separate pan, heat a couple of tablespoons of oil over medium heat.
Add the norteno to the pan and cook until heated through.
Add the smoke paprika and hot sauce (if using) to the norteno and stir to combine.
Season the norteno with salt to taste.
Assemble the tacos by placing a spoonful of the norteno onto a crispy totopo.
